item.title: TRAPS: Therapeutic Response Analysis via Pathway-informed Stratification
item.description:
Highlights

  • Built the first unified benchmark for pathway-guided cancer therapy-response modeling (BINN, GraphPath, PATH) under identical conditions.
  • Multi-task pipeline over 2,622 TCGA patients across 5 cohorts using Reactome pathway-activity features.
  • Best model reached 0.92 AUROC on prostate targeted-therapy prediction at 11% class prevalence.

item.title: Benchmarking Bioemu-1: Establishing a Baseline for Protein Structural Ensemble Prediction
item.description:
Highlights

  • Established baseline benchmarks for Bioemu-1 on protein structural-ensemble prediction.
  • Defined reproducible metrics for computational structural biology.
